channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How a Sacco Election Candidate Turned to a Quick Loan to Fund His Campaign
item.description: This article narrates the story of a Sacco member who believes that taking a quick loan is the only practical way to run a competitive election campaign within his co‑operative society. It explains th...

item.title: National Lok Adalat disposes over 4,400 cases in Dakshina Kannada and Udupi, pendency remains above 90,000
item.description: After the National Lok Adalat concluded on Saturday, the pending cases in Dakshina Kannada's 46 courts reduced to 54,742, while in Udupi district's 22 courts, it stood at 35,866, keeping the combined ...

item.title: Al-Quds Day protesters and counter-protesters assemble on opposite sides of the Thames in London
item.description: Thousands of protesters and counter-protesters gathered on either side of the River Thames in central London for the annual al-Quds Day demonstration. Police had anticipated a large turnout and deploy...

item.title: House Justice Committee awaits Vice President Sara Duterte's response to impeachment complaints as 10-day deadline approaches
item.description: The House Committee on Justice has given Vice President Sara Duterte a 10-day period to submit her answer to the impeachment complaints filed against her. This deadline is fast approaching, with repor...

item.title: Trump’s diplomatic efforts face challenges amid rising oil prices and central bank meetings
item.description: US President Donald Trump is seeking support as global central banks prepare to address the economic impact of rising oil prices and inflation concerns. The current crisis in the Middle East has pushe...

item.title: Proposed 54-Storey Tower Raises Heritage Concerns Near London's Historic Courthouse
item.description: Plans to build a 54-storey, 800-unit residential tower next to the nearly 200-year-old Middlesex County Courthouse in London, Ontario, are raising concerns among heritage advocates. The courthouse, de...

item.title: Highlights from the 19th South African Film and Television Awards
item.description: The 19th South African Film and Television Awards (Saftas) took place at the Gallagher Convention Centre, bringing together actors, directors, producers, and other industry professionals to recognise ...

item.title: New export centre to train and link Tanzanian youth entrepreneurs with global markets by 2030
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has launched a major sourcing and export initiative aimed at connecting youth-led businesses with regional and international markets by the year 2030. The programme, introdu...

item.title: NPA’s efficient port operations help Nigeria achieve ₦14trillion trade surplus
item.description: The Nigerian Ports Authority (NPA) don show say correct management fit really boost Nigeria trade. Between June and September 2025, Nigeria record trade surplus wey pass ₦14 trillion, thanks to NPA sm...

item.title: Simon Fuller to Publish Memoir Reflecting on Five Decades in Showbiz
item.description: Simon Fuller, renowned for managing the Spice Girls, S Club 7, and music icons such as Amy Winehouse, as well as sports stars like Sir Andy Murray and Lewis Hamilton, is set to release a candid autobi...

item.title: Pakistan and Saudi Arabia Discuss Measures to Reduce Tensions in Muslim World
item.description: Pakistan and Saudi Arabia have recently intensified their diplomatic engagement to prevent rising regional tensions from turning into a wider conflict among Muslim nations. The understanding came duri...

item.title: Pro-Iran supporters hold Al-Quds Day protest in London amid heavy police presence
item.description: Thousands of pro-Iran demonstrators gathered on the South Bank of the Thames in London on 15 March 2026 for an Al-Quds Day protest, which was reduced to a static demonstration after the Home Secretary...

item.title: Tanzania to Commemorate Five Years Since Former President Magufuli’s Passing in Chato
item.description: Tanzania is set to mark the fifth anniversary of the passing of former President Dr John Magufuli, who died on March 17, 2021. The main ceremony will take place at his home in Chato District, Geita Re...

item.title: Philippine Government Repatriates Over 1,300 OFWs Amid Middle East Conflict
item.description: From March 5 to March 14, 2026, over 1,300 Filipinos stranded in the Middle East were safely repatriated under the Philippine government's Bagong Pilipinas Repatriation Program. The Department of Migr...

item.title: Nakuru Woman Faces Heartbreak After Building Mother’s House, Denied Entry
item.description: Naomi Mugure, a 27-year-old woman from Nakuru, is facing a very tough time despite her hard work abroad. She went to Qatar to work as a domestic helper and later as a security personnel, earning enoug...

item.title: Collection of Political and Social Cartoons, 16 March 2026
item.description: This gallery features a selection of cartoons published on 16 March 2026, highlighting political and social commentary relevant to current federal issues. The collection includes four distinct images ...

item.title: Toronto transit agencies debate plastic versus fabric seats for buses and light rail
item.description: Toronto’s transit seats, whether on buses, streetcars, or subways, have sparked a conversation about hygiene, comfort, and design. The TTC is gradually switching from fabric to plastic seats on its bu...

item.title: Complete Guide to Makerere University Courses, Fees, and Application Process
item.description: Makerere University, established in 1922 in Uganda, is one of Africa's top institutions, producing notable alumni including presidents and prime ministers. The university has ten colleges and multiple...

item.title: Southern Guards gain momentum ahead of LIV Golf’s South African debut at Steyn City
item.description: The Southern Guards are heading into LIV Golf’s South African debut at Steyn City with growing confidence following a solid showing in Singapore, where they finished fifth. While the team had opportun...

item.title: Understanding Adam Smith: The Moral Foundations of Economic Self-Interest
item.description: In this article, Father Raymond J. de Souza explores the moral underpinnings of Adam Smith's economic thought, highlighting the philosopher’s belief that self-interest and benevolence are not mutually...
